name: Patty Duke Astin's Deep Dish Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 7/2 cups Tart green cooking apples, peeled and sliced
1 teaspoon Ground cinnamon OR 1/2 teaspoon Ground mace
3 tablespoons Sweet butter, cut into small pieces
1/2 cup Dairy sour or heavy cream
1 Egg yolk mixed with 1 tablespoon water
Whipped cream or ice cream or good aged cheddar cheese, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out half the dough and line a deep 9-inch pie plate; set aside.
2. Wrap the remainder of the dough in aluminum foil and refrigerate until ready to roll out.
3. Peel and slice apples.
4. Combine white sugar, brown sugar, flour, salt, spices.
5. Coat apples with the mixture.
6. Add butter, lemon juice, and rind.
7. Fill the lower crust with apple mixture.
8. Spread sour cream over apples.
9. Roll out the top crust; cut a steam vent.
10. Attach the top crust to the lower crust, sealing edges.
11. Brush the top with egg yolk-water mixture.
12. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 50 minutes.
13. Serve warm with whipped cream or a slice of cheddar cheese per serving. Serves 6 to 8.
